title: telemetry — Artisan commands
description: Unified command surface across the three signals. Every command accepts `--signal={traces|metrics|logs|all}` to scope its behaviour when relevant.

commands.purpose: Prints the compiled registries: SpanRegistry + MetricRegistry (for traces + metrics signals) + LogContextRegistry (for logs signal). Filter by --module or --class. Supersedes `otel:describe` + `logs:describe`.
Fires a synthetic trace + metric + log record to the configured exporters/sinks. Reports round-trip time + response. Useful for smoke-testing config on deploy. Supersedes `otel:test-export`.
Prints a summary of the last N sampled traces from local buffer (when the SDK's debug processor is active). Dev-only. Supersedes `otel:sample-traces`.
Tail structured logs from the local file sink with JSON pretty-printing. Dev-only. Supersedes `logs:tail`.
Emit a synthetic log record. Verifies the pipeline end-to-end including trace_id enrichment from the OTel context. Supersedes `logs:test-emit`.
